title: Add protect_from_forgery plug to a new API pipeline
prompt:
A developer has created this router pipeline for an admin JSON API that shares the session cookie with the browser pipeline:

```elixir
pipeline :admin_api do
  plug :accepts, ["json"]
  plug :fetch_session
end
```

This pipeline is vulnerable to CSRF + CSWSH because it omits `:protect_from_forgery`. Add the CSRF protection plug and make sure the pipeline still parses JSON request bodies. Write the corrected router to `lib/my_app_web/router.ex`. The fix must include `plug :protect_from_forgery` in the `:admin_api` pipeline.
tier_rationale: Canonical CSRF fix — add one plug line to a pipeline.
research_citation: Arrowsmith Labs: 'Phoenix automatically applies CSRF protection to all non-GET endpoints.'
